## Problem

What workflow, limitation, or pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Why It Fits PatchPilot

Explain how this helps PatchPilot's target use case: homelabs and small Debian/Ubuntu VM fleets.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or links if helpful.
